subcodes.first_line: The days have come wherein souls are sorely troubled and faces are altered, save those who have detached themselves unto God and held fast [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتت ایام فیها اضطربت النفوس و تغیرت الوجوه الا من انقطع الی الله و تمسک
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @call to action
